title: The Power of IRL | TCE - DevConnect Buenos Aires
description:
The Power of IRL

@FWBtweets is a global ecosystem of culturalists, creators and builders with a shared vision for a better internet. This conversation explores the possibilities of taking onchain culture into IRL.

Speakers:
• Greg Bresnitz (@FWBtweets) — @GregBresnitz
 • Jules (@zerion) — @Julessw_
 • Malcolm (@RefractionDAO) — @mal_levy
